overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a cowboy riding a horse through tall prairie grass at night. The rider traverses open grassland, navigates through dense brush, and crosses a rocky creek bed in a continuous nocturnal journey.

agents.ego_description: riding horse at steady canter through tall grass prairie, heading toward distant hills

entered.detail: tall green grass swaying in the wind, covering the ground completely
single large tree silhouetted against the dark night sky
rolling hills visible on the horizon under the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide-open prairie at night, with the camera following a rider on horseback through waist-high grass. A solitary tree stands on the left horizon as the rider moves steadily forward toward distant hills.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie with dense shrubs and brush

events.description: entering area with denser shrubs and brush on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: guiding horse through denser vegetation, navigating around bushes and fallen logs

entered.detail: thick bush with twisted branches and dense foliage
large dead tree trunk lying horizontally on the ground

segments.scene_description: The rider enters a section of prairie with denser vegetation, passing close to large shrubs and bushes on the left. The terrain becomes more varied with fallen logs and thicker undergrowth as the horse continues forward.

events.description: horse descends into rocky creek bed and begins crossing the shallow stream

agents.ego_description: carefully riding horse across rocky terrain and through shallow water in the creek bed

entered.detail: dry and shallow creek bed filled with stones and rocks of various sizes
large rock outcropping beside the creek

segments.scene_description: The rider guides the horse down into a rocky creek bed, navigating carefully over the uneven stones. The horse splashes through shallow water patches as it crosses the dry stream bed between grassy banks.

events.description: exiting the rocky creek bed and returning to open grassland

agents.ego_description: continuing ride through open prairie after crossing the creek, heading toward distant formations

entered.detail: large rock formation visible on the horizon ahead

segments.scene_description: After crossing the creek, the rider emerges back into open grassland. The terrain stretches ahead toward distant rock formations on the horizon, with scattered trees visible in the far distance as the journey continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a nocturnal prairie that transitions from open grasslands into dense brush and a rocky creek bed. It begins with a rider on horseback moving through waist-high grass toward distant hills, passing a solitary tree on the horizon. As the horse advances, the terrain shifts into a section of denser vegetation, weaving past large shrubs and fallen logs. The camera then follows the rider down into a rocky creek bed, navigating over uneven stones and splashing through shallow water patches between grassy banks. Finally, the scene opens back up into expansive grassland as the rider emerges from the creek and heads toward distant rock formations under the night sky.
